highlights.text: Tokyo (3N) → Osaka (2N) → Kyoto (2N) Golden Route explorer
Universal Studios Japan express passes & Super Nintendo World
Private sushi masterclass & Mt. Fuji Lake Ashi cruise
First-class Shinkansen with TRAGUIN luggage forwarding

itinerary.title: Japan Family Expedition
itinerary.tagline: Tokyo • Mt. Fuji • Osaka Universal • Kyoto Shrines
itinerary.overview: The ultimate multigenerational family journey through the Land of the Rising Sun. Connecting Tokyo's neon horizons, Osaka's Universal Studios thrills, and Kyoto's UNESCO heritage forests — with private luxury vans, first-class Shinkansen, luggage forwarding, and 24/7 bilingual support.
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Japan family package (JP-002): Tokyo, Mt. Fuji, Universal Studios Osaka, Kyoto shrines, sushi masterclass, and Shinkansen.

highlights.text: Mt. Fuji & Lake Ashi Pirate Ship Cruise

days.title: Arrival in Tokyo & Shibuya Neon Cruise
days.description: Premium airport reception. Private executive van to central hotel. Evening exploration of Shibuya neon pathways and Shibuya Scramble.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, private luxury van transit, Shibuya Scramble trail
Evening Experience: Family welcome dinner at upscale traditional Japanese restaurant
Overnight Stay: Tokyo City Centre (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Traditional Japanese Welcome Dinner

days.title: Historic Asakusa & Private Sushi Masterclass
days.description: Senso-ji Temple and Nakamise craft street. Private family sushi-making masterclass. Priority entry to teamLab Planets digital art maze.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Senso-ji Temple guided tour, TeamLab Planets priority entry
Special Curation: Private family sushi-making masterclass
Overnight Stay: Tokyo City Centre (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Masterclass Sushi Lunch

days.title: Mt. Fuji Panoramic Landscapes & Lake Ashi Cruise
days.description: Drive to Mt. Fuji Subaru 5th Station. Scenic Lake Ashi pirate ship cruise. TRAGUIN luggage forwarding from Tokyo to Osaka.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Mt. Fuji 5th Station access, Lake Ashi pirate ship cruise
Logistics Highlight: Luggage forwarding from Tokyo to Osaka
Overnight Stay: Tokyo City Centre (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Casual Fuji-view Lunch

days.title: First-Class Bullet Train to Osaka
days.description: First-class Shinkansen to Osaka. Evening exploration of Dotonbori neon canal walkways and Glico Man banner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: First-class Shinkansen ticket, Dotonbori orientation walk
Overnight Stay: Osaka Centre (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Dotonbori Street-Food Dinner

days.title: Universal Studios Japan Full-Day Immersion
days.description: Full day at Universal Studios Japan with express passes. Super Nintendo World, Mario Kart, and Wizarding World of Harry Potter.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Universal Studios Japan admission, express priority passes
Overnight Stay: Osaka Centre (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Theme Park Dine-around Vouchers

days.title: Osaka Castle to the Bamboo Forests of Kyoto
days.description: Osaka Castle park tour. Transfer to Kyoto. Walk through Arashiyama Bamboo Grove.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Osaka Castle guided tour, Arashiyama Bamboo Grove trail
Overnight Stay: Kyoto Heritage Centre (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Kyoto Cuisine Dinner

days.title: Golden Pavilion & Red Torii Pathways Gala
days.description: Kinkaku-ji Golden Pavilion. Fushimi Inari Shrine torii gate trail. Grand farewell dinner with cultural performances.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Kinkaku-ji entry, Fushimi Inari torii trail
Evening Experience: Grand farewell family feast with cultural performances
Overnight Stay: Kyoto Heritage Centre (Premium Luxury Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Grand Farewell Gala Dinner

days.title: High-End Transit & Kansai Departure
days.description: Final luxurious breakfast. Private luxury van to Osaka Kansai International Airport with luggage coordination.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury van airport departure, priority luggage coordination
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in family-friendly premium luxury hotel rooms or suites
Daily breakfast spreads and curated specialty fine dinners
First-class Shinkansen bullet train tickets from Tokyo to Osaka
TRAGUIN seamless hotel-to-hotel luggage forwarding (1 bag per person)
Skip-the-line Universal Studios express, TeamLab Planets, and Golden Pavilion
Private family sushi-making masterclass with expert Japanese chef
TRAGUIN 24/7 bilingual destination managers and guest assistance
International flight tickets and Japan entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar billing
Tipping, porterage fees, or optional sightseeing not mentioned
